name: civic-forecast
description: A daily forecast for civic life in the United States.

scripts.deploy:pages: wrangler pages deploy public --project-name civic-forecast -c wrangler.pages.toml
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:pages && npm run deploy:worker
scripts.secrets:set: wrangler secret put PROPUBLICA && wrangler secret put COURTLISTENER && wrangler secret put ACLED && wrangler secret put ANTHROPIC
